item.title: Publications
item.author: contact@sudokara.com (Shrikara Arun)
item.description:
Google Scholar | DBLP

Here are the open versions of my publications. Note that some may be preprints and slightly different from the final published version.

  • “Towards Architecting Sustainable MLOps: A Self-Adaptation Approach” - a poster in ICSA 2024 (International Conference on Software Architecture). Won the best poster award.

  • “LLMs for Generation of Architectural Components: An Exploratory Empirical Study in the Serverless World” in ICSA 2025 Research Track.

  • “Engineering LLM Powered Multi-agent Framework for Autonomous CloudOps” in CAIN 2025 Research & Experience Track (Conference on AI Engineering). Was a Distinguished Paper Award Candidate.
item.content:encoded:
Google Scholar | DBLP

Here are the open versions of my publications. Note that some may be preprints and slightly different from the final published version.

  • “Towards Architecting Sustainable MLOps: A Self-Adaptation Approach” - a poster in ICSA 2024 (International Conference on Software Architecture). Won the best poster award.

  • “LLMs for Generation of Architectural Components: An Exploratory Empirical Study in the Serverless World” in ICSA 2025 Research Track.

  • “Engineering LLM Powered Multi-agent Framework for Autonomous CloudOps” in CAIN 2025 Research & Experience Track (Conference on AI Engineering). Was a Distinguished Paper Award Candidate.

item.title: Now
item.author: contact@sudokara.com (Shrikara Arun)
item.description:
Things I think are cool/am doing right now:

  • a decent tiling window manager workflow for macOS
  • split mechanical keyboards
  • trackball mice
  • split mechanical keyboards WITH a trackball !! (Ex: Charybdis)
  • self-hosting and homelabbing
  • BangPypers, The Bangalore Python User Group - I attended their August meetup, was very fun
  • a minimal static website theme that’s also decently functional - search, latex, a social card

Use the reply button below if you have something else I’ll like or you just want to chat
item.content:encoded:
Things I think are cool/am doing right now:

  • a decent tiling window manager workflow for macOS
  • split mechanical keyboards
  • trackball mice
  • split mechanical keyboards WITH a trackball !! (Ex: Charybdis)
  • self-hosting and homelabbing
  • BangPypers, The Bangalore Python User Group - I attended their August meetup, was very fun
  • a minimal static website theme that’s also decently functional - search, latex, a social card

Use the reply button below if you have something else I’ll like or you just want to chat
